title: panicum dichotomum var. nodiflorum
intro: Panicum dichotomum var. nodiflorum, also known as forked panic grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family, characterized by its distinctive forked panicles and hairy leaves. The medicinal properties of forked panic grass have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. In traditional herbal medicine, forked panic grass is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its aerial parts are used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions.
